'''jogavaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:iatrogenic|iatrogenic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-g-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:iatrogenic|iatrogenic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| jogavaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jogavithi|jogavithi]] || [[word:jogaviji|jogaviji]] || [[word:jogavishi|jogavishi]] || [[word:jogaviki|jogaviki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:jogavuthuthu|jogavuthuthu]] || [[word:jogavujuju|jogavujuju]] || [[word:jogavushushu|jogavushushu]] || [[word:jogavukuku|jogavukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:jogavuthu|jogavuthu]] || [[word:jogavuju|jogavuju]] || [[word:jogavushu|jogavushu]] || [[word:jogavuku|jogavuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:jogavufthuf|jogavufthuf]] || [[word:jogavufjuf|jogavufjuf]] || [[word:jogavufshuf|jogavufshuf]] || [[word:jogavufkuf|jogavufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jogavethe|jogavethe]] || [[word:jogaveje|jogaveje]] || [[word:jogaveshe|jogaveshe]] || [[word:jogaveke|jogaveke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jogavothotho|jogavothotho]] || [[word:jogavojojo|jogavojojo]] || [[word:jogavoshosho|jogavoshosho]] || [[word:jogavokoko|jogavokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jogavotho|jogavotho]] || [[word:jogavojo|jogavojo]] || [[word:jogavosho|jogavosho]] || [[word:jogavoko|jogavoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jogavofthof|jogavofthof]] || [[word:jogavofjof|jogavofjof]] || [[word:jogavofshof|jogavofshof]] || [[word:jogavofkof|jogavofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:jogavÃŸfthÃŸf|jogavÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:jogavÃŸfjÃŸf|jogavÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:jogavÃŸfshÃŸf|jogavÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:jogavÃŸfkÃŸf|jogavÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:jogavÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|jogavÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:jogavÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|jogavÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:jogavÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|jogavÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:jogavÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|jogavÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:jogavÃŸfthÃŸf|jogavÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:jogavÃŸfjÃŸf|jogavÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:jogavÃŸfshÃŸf|jogavÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:jogavÃŸfkÃŸf|jogavÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:jogavÃŸfthÃŸf|jogavÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:jogavÃŸfjÃŸf|jogavÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:jogavÃŸfshÃŸf|jogavÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:jogavÃŸfkÃŸf|jogavÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jogavÃḊthÃḊ|jogavÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:jogavÃḊjÃḊ|jogavÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:jogavÃḊshÃḊ|jogavÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:jogavÃḊkÃḊ|jogavÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jogavathatha|jogavathatha]] || [[word:jogavajaja|jogavajaja]] || [[word:jogavashasha|jogavashasha]] || [[word:jogavakaka|jogavakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jogavatha|jogavatha]] || [[word:jogavaja|jogavaja]] || [[word:jogavasha|jogavasha]] || [[word:jogavaka|jogavaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jogavafthaf|jogavafthaf]] || [[word:jogavafjaf|jogavafjaf]] || [[word:jogavafshaf|jogavafshaf]] || [[word:jogavafkaf|jogavafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:jogavasha|jogavasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:jogavshÃḋsha|jogavshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jogavrosha|jogavrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jogavmusha|jogavmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:jogavyasha|jogavyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojogavnkshÃḋsha|gojogavnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojogavnkrosha|gojogavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojogavnkmusha|gojogavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojogavnkyasha|gojogavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:jogagavasha|jogagavasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jogagavshÃḋsha|jogagavshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jogagavrosha|jogagavrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jogagavmusha|jogagavmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jogagavyasha|jogagavyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojogagavnkshÃḋsha|gojogagavnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojogagavnkrosha|gojogagavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojogagavnkmusha|gojogagavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojogagavnkyasha|gojogagavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:jegÃḊvasha|jegÃḊvasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jegÃḊvshÃḋsha|jegÃḊvshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jegÃḊvrosha|jegÃḊvrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jegÃḊvmusha|jegÃḊvmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jegÃḊvyasha|jegÃḊvyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojegÃḊvnkshÃḋsha|gojegÃḊvnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojegÃḊvnkrosha|gojegÃḊvnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojegÃḊvnkmusha|gojegÃḊvnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojegÃḊvnkyasha|gojegÃḊvnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:jogfavasha|jogfavasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jogfavshÃḋsha|jogfavshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jogfavrosha|jogfavrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jogfavmusha|jogfavmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jogfavyasha|jogfavyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojogfavnkshÃḋsha|gojogfavnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojogfavnkrosha|gojogfavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojogfavnkmusha|gojogfavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojogfavnkyasha|gojogfavnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
